package rulecoverage

func NegativeGetRawDataThenShouldBindjsonDuplicateBody() string {
    ruleID := "get_raw_data_then_should_bindjson_duplicate_body"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that read GetRawData() and later bind JSON from the same request body."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
